cause_analysis.narrative: Luminex Wellness & Aesthetics churned on 2026-04-10 after 85 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-03-12 via sms — 29 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 5 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 29 day(s) before churn via sms. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 5 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-02-03 via app_chat, client wrote: "Ok…" — no outbound response in 28 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-02-12 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: RCA reports for your SEO performance\n\nBody: I have all services listed in my GBP. On Wed, Feb 11, 2026 at…" — no outbound response in 19 days.
